ab: a pitu waluwan i, muka ku i takesian a uninan.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: uwangesall mi lla temakesi. musabak i takakesian na sinsi. “karetigir driya! semungala ta!” kema na kemakedreng dra risarisan.
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: a temakakesi mi i, tu paladamaw mi kana sinsi temarapuyuma dra aaipan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the Pinuyumayan language of numbers.

ab: kurenang mi kana sinsi maip. semenay mi kana senay na aaipan.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: sadru ku niladaladaman na ngai na tinarapuyuma.
en: I have learned many Pinuyumayan languages.

ab: muka ku i takesian aw meladaladam ku temarapuyuma kana wawariwari. rarengay ku pakillengaw kan ina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the Pinuyumayan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
